hero.imageAlt: High-energy live concert crowd at night with vibrant stage lights and raised hands
hero.title: Concert & Touring as a <spanTag>Service.</spanTag>
hero.description: TourStack by Ckrowd connects concert & festival promoters with artiste management companies. Plan live music with confidence — from discovery to execution.

why.title: Built for the Touring Business
why.description: A dedicated platform for the entire touring ecosystem — Promoters, Artiste Management, Service Providers, Banks, Insurance, and Workforce.

centralized.title: Centralized Touring Workflow
centralized.desc: Manage every stage of tour planning in one place — from discovery to execution. No fragmented spreadsheets, no missed messages.

matching.title: Smart Promoter–Artiste Matching
matching.desc: Rule-based matching connects promoters with artistes based on date availability, venue capacity, and budget alignment.

dataDriven.title: Data-Driven Event Planning
dataDriven.desc: Generate business summaries with estimated revenue, cost projections, and risk notes — structured for financiers from day one.

financing.title: Financing & Insurance Support
financing.desc: Track financing requirements, connect with capital partners, and unlock insurance backing to scale ambitious live experiences.

promoters.title: Join the Pan-African Tour Circuit.
promoters.description: Become part of a structured, continent-wide touring network. Discover top-tier artistes, submit formal Expressions of Interest, and access financing support to bring ambitious shows to life.

features.stop: Show interest in being part of a Tour Stop
features.discovery: Discover and submit EOIs for top-tier artistes
features.financing: State financing needs for your concert or festival
features.alignment: Streamline planning and align with other Tour Promoters

promoters.imageAlt: Music producer working on a sophisticated digital soundboard in an orange-lit studio

artists.title: Expand into New Markets.
artists.description: State your touring intent, get matched with serious promoters, and receive structured high-quality booking requests. Reduce friction and grow with confidence across new territories.

features.intent: State interest to tour and set your availability window
features.matching: Get matched with verified, serious promoters
features.alignment: Align on tour dates and expand into new markets

artists.imageAlt: Solo artist performing with intense emotion on a smoke-filled stage under a single bright spotlight

announcement.title: Ckrowd Announces Tour & Artistes
announcement.desc: Admin creates a Tour Project on TourStack — including artiste roster, fee range, availability dates, and technical requirements.

submission.title: Promoter Submits Expression of Interest
submission.desc: Promoters browse available artistes and tours, then submit a formal EOI with their venue, date, budget, and funding model.

matching.title: Matching & Review
matching.desc: TourStack scores each EOI against artiste requirements. Ckrowd team reviews flagged matches and makes informed decisions.

decision.title: Report & Decision
decision.desc: The system generates a business summary — estimated revenue, costs, and risk notes — structured for financiers. Admin approves, rejects, or requests revision.

cta.title: Ready to Take the Stage?
cta.description: Join TourStack and become part of the Pan-African touring ecosystem. Whether you're a promoter, artiste management company, or service provider — this is your platform.

hero.title:
Insurance for Every Role.

Built Into the Pipeline.
hero.description: SanlamAllianz-powered coverage embedded in the CTaaS certification pipeline — activating automatically as you onboard.

cta.title: Ready to activate your coverage?
cta.description: Complete CTaaS certification and insurance activates automatically.

activates.title: Insurance Activates at This Step
activates.description: SanlamAllianz coverage activates automatically upon certification completion. No separate application required.

finance.title: Finance Products Unlocked
finance.description: Tour finance facilities are now available via Access Bank. Apply directly through the Financing tab.

underwriter.title: Insurance Underwriter
underwriter.description: Pan-African insurance leader. 27 markets. All product lines underwritten and managed in-partnership with Ckrowd.

cta.title: Complete certification to activate coverage
cta.description: Insurance products are embedded in the pipeline. No separate application required.

items.q: Do I need to be certified before insurance activates?
items.a: Yes. Insurance coverage activates automatically at Step 4 of the CTaaS certification pipeline. No separate insurance application is required.

items.q: Can I apply for finance before my EOI is approved?
items.a: You can start the process, but finance eligibility is unlocked at Step 5 — after certification and bank onboarding are complete.

items.q: What happens if the event is cancelled?
items.a: Promoter-initiated cancellation triggers the Event Cancellation policy. Claims are processed within 30 days via SanlamAllianz.

items.q: Is a bank account in Africa required?
items.a: Yes. Funds and insurance premiums are routed via Access Bank. The enterprise account is opened as part of the onboarding pipeline.

promoter.label: Tour Promoter
promoter.description: Concert & event organisers running CTaaS-certified tour stops

steps.label: Submit EOI
steps.detail: Apply for a tour stop via the Discovery page. Complete your Expression of Interest and select your preferred markets.

steps.label: Certification Training
steps.detail: Complete CTaaS LMS certification. Pass the Promoter module to unlock certified partner status.

steps.label: Access Bank Onboarding
steps.detail: Open an Enterprise Account via the Ckrowd partnership with Access Bank. Required for insurance and finance activation.

steps.label: Insurance Activation
steps.detail: SanlamAllianz Business Insurance activates upon certification completion. Coverage includes event cancellation, liability, and credit guarantee.

steps.label: Finance Eligibility
steps.detail: Certified Access Bank account becomes Paymaster-eligible. Tour Stop Advance and Venue Build-Out Credit unlocked.

coverage.desc: Artist withdrawal, weather events, force majeure. Protects full event revenue.
Public liability, property damage, business interruption for the promoter entity.
Underwrites Tour Stop Advance lending facility. Enables Access Bank lending.
Embedded at checkout — refund guarantee for ticket holders if event is cancelled.

workforce.label: Touring Workforce
workforce.description: Sound engineers, lighting crews, stage managers, production staff deployed across tour stops

steps.label: WCS Registration
steps.detail: Register as a Workforce Contractor on Ckrowd. Submit skills, experience, and availability.

steps.label: Vetting & Verification
steps.detail: Skills assessment, reference check, and identity verification completed by Ckrowd operations.

steps.label: Touring Agent Certification
steps.detail: Complete role-specific CTaaS training module. Earn your Touring Agent certification badge.

steps.label: Group Insurance Activation
steps.detail: Personal accident, employer liability, and contractor coverage activated via SanlamAllianz group policy.

steps.label: Cross-Border Deployment
steps.detail: Access cross-border payroll via PAPSS. Deploy to certified tour stops across 27 markets.

coverage.desc: Personal accident and injury coverage for all certified touring workforce members.
Employer liability protection covering workplace injuries and claims.
Professional indemnity and equipment coverage for independent contractors.

vendor.label: SMEs & Vendors
vendor.description: Production companies, equipment suppliers, catering, merchandise, and transport providers

steps.label: Vendor EOI
steps.detail: Submit Expression of Interest to supply services to certified tour stops. Specify your category and capacity.

steps.label: Ckrowd Supplier Vetting
steps.detail: Capacity check, business registration verification, and quality assessment conducted by Ckrowd.

steps.label: Approved Vendor Listing
steps.detail: Listed in Ckrowd Vendor Marketplace and matched to relevant tour stops based on geography and capacity.

steps.label: Insurance Profile Creation
steps.detail: SME business insurance bundle activated via SanlamAllianz. Covers equipment, cargo, and business interruption.

steps.label: Finance Access
steps.detail: Working capital pre-event financing unlocked for approved vendors with certified tour stop contracts.

coverage.desc: Charter aircraft, production equipment, and high-value cargo in transit.
Revenue protection if supply contracts are disrupted due to event cancellation.
Covers service delivery failures and contractual liability claims.

talent.label: Artist Management
talent.description: Agencies and management companies supplying artists to CTaaS-certified tour stops

steps.label: Talent Supplier Registration
steps.detail: Register your management company. Submit artist roster and territory preferences.

steps.label: Artist LOI Submission
steps.detail: Submit Letter of Interest for specific tour stops. Attach artist technical rider and fee schedule.

steps.label: Contract & Block Rate Agreement
steps.detail: Negotiate block-rate artist fee agreements with promoters via the Ckrowd platform.

steps.label: Insurance Embed
steps.detail: Artist non-appearance and tour liability coverage embedded into performance contracts automatically.

steps.label: Paymaster Integration
steps.detail: Artist fees routed via certified Paymaster. Milestone-based release tied to performance completion.

coverage.desc: Covers artist cancellation due to illness, injury, or force majeure.
Revenue guarantee product protecting management fees and artist earnings.
Third-party liability arising from artist performance and production activities.

ecosystemFlow.label: Register & EOI
ecosystemFlow.desc: Submit Expression of Interest and select your stakeholder type.

ecosystemFlow.label: Vetting
ecosystemFlow.desc: Identity, capacity, and business credentials verified.

productSuite.name: Event Cancellation
productSuite.desc: Protects event revenue against cancellation, non-appearance, and force majeure events.

productSuite.name: Credit Guarantee
productSuite.desc: Underwrites Tour Stop Advance lending facility. Highest-value product in the portfolio.

productSuite.name: Promoter Business

productSuite.name: Touring Workforce
productSuite.desc: Group personal accident, employer liability, and contractor coverage for touring crew.

productSuite.name: Aviation & Equipment
productSuite.desc: Charter aircraft, production equipment, and high-value cargo specialty coverage.

productSuite.name: Audience Ticket Protection
productSuite.desc: Embedded refund guarantee for ticket holders. Activated at checkout automatically.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: TourStack by Crowd collects information you provide when registering an account, submitting an Expression of Interest, or onboarding as a stakeholder. This includes your name, email address, phone number, company details, and venue information.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to facilitate tour bookings, verify stakeholder credentials, process EOI applications, and communicate platform updates. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.title: 3. Data Storage
sections.content: Your data is stored securely. For this platform version, certain preferences are stored locally in your browser via localStorage. Server-side data is protected through industry-standard encryption.

sections.title: 4. Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related enquiries, contact us at {contactLink} or email {email}.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using TourStack by Crowd, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use the platform.

sections.title: 2. Platform Use
sections.content: TourStack is a B2B platform connecting promoters, service providers, and workforce professionals in the Pan-African live events industry. Use of the platform is restricted to registered businesses and verified individuals.

sections.title: 3. Accuracy of Information
sections.content: You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and throughout your use of the platform. Misrepresentation may result in account suspension or removal.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content, branding, and platform design are the property of Ckrowd Africa Technologies. Unauthorised reproduction or distribution is prohibited.

sections.title: 5. Contact
sections.content: For terms-related enquiries, visit our {contactLink} or email {email}.

step1.title: Browse Tour Projects
step1.description: Ckrowd announces artistes and tours. Browse and filter by genre, date, fee, or region.

step2.title: Submit Your EOI
step2.description: Submit a formal Expression of Interest with your venue, date, budget, and funding plan.

step3.title: Matching & Review
step3.description: Ckrowd scores your EOI against artiste requirements and reviews your application.

step4.title: Decision & Execution
step4.description: You receive Approved, Rejected, or Needs Revision — then proceed to planning.

financing.title: Financing Support Available
financing.description: Get up to 40% of the artiste fee covered upfront through TourStack's capital partners.

hero.title: Capital for <spanNode>Every Tour Stop.</spanNode>
hero.description: TourStack connects promoters across Africa with purpose-built financing products — so cash flow never stands between you and a world-class show.

noApplications.title: No applications yet
noApplications.description: Browse our financing products below and apply to cover your event costs.

p1.name: Tour Stop Advance
p1.description: Get up to 40% of the agreed artiste fee covered before the event date. Repaid automatically from gate receipts.

p2.name: Venue Build-Out Credit
p2.description: Finance staging, sound, lighting, and production upgrades needed to host a qualifying tour stop.

p3.name: Event Insurance Bundle
p3.description: Comprehensive cover for cancellation, adverse weather, public liability, and artiste no-show.

p4.name: Marketing & Ticketing Float
p4.description: Unlock working capital to run pre-event marketing and cover ticketing platform fees before revenue lands.

s1.title: Submit EOI
s1.description: Apply for a tour stop on the Discovery page. A confirmed EOI unlocks financing eligibility.

s2.title: Select Product
s2.description: Choose the financing product that fits your event budget and timeline.

s3.title: Upload Documents
s3.description: Submit venue contract, projected gate receipts, and ID verification.

s4.title: Decision in 48h
s4.description: Our capital partners review and issue a term sheet within two business days.

s5.title: Funds Disbursed
s5.description: Approved funds land in your account before the event build-out deadline.

cta.title: Ready to Unlock Funding?
cta.description: Start your EOI and your financing profile in one flow.

f1.q: Do I need a bank account in Africa to qualify?
f1.a: Yes. Funds are disbursed to a verified business account in the country of the tour stop. We support accounts in 18 African markets.

f2.q: Can I apply for financing before my EOI is approved?
f2.a: You can start your financing profile at any time, but funds will only be released once your EOI is marked Approved by Ckrowd.

f3.q: What happens if the event is cancelled?
f3.a: Cancellation triggered by the artiste is covered by the Event Insurance Bundle. Promoter-initiated cancellations are subject to the repayment schedule in your term sheet.

f4.q: Is there a minimum event budget to qualify?
f4.a: Tour Stop Advance requires a minimum confirmed artiste fee of $5,000. Other products have their own thresholds as shown above.

Metadata.title: Tourstack by Ckrowd
Metadata.description: Tourstack by Ckrowd connects artists, promoters, and financiers on a single high-performance stage.
